title: Pale — About
answer: There are ways of being inducted into the practices, those esoteric traditions that predate computers, cell phones, industry, and even paper and bronze. Soul – Soul is the blueprint that determines ‘us’. We start out as derivatives of our parents (ugh) and a lot of those doors are closed, except the woohoo (for the butt) and needs, and our Crown is cracked wiiiiide open, so we’re taking in the world like crazy. title: WoG · Loose Ends – E.3
question: So… I wonder what would happen if January March visited Australia – which has one of its major holidays, Australia Day, celebrating the landing of the first colonists in Sydney Harbor on January 26. It’s also called Invasion Day by some
answer: Specifically, she’s very ‘huge, international holiday with capitalist backing’, so lesser holidays, religion specific, or religion-specific ones don’t count.
